data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for photo annotation, which includes markups, arrows, and text on images. However, while the use case mentions that the site supervisor annotates photos with measurements and marks safety concerns with arrows, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the functionality of photo annotation as a feature within the API or application. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the feature is implemented or functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of photo annotation functionality in the API.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
